narrative:
Unity Twp township has 6,256 registered voters, with 60.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.7 percentage points.
